name: WHOGHO_search_indicators
description: Search WHO Global Health Observatory (GHO) health indicators by name using the ODATA API. Returns indicator codes and names covering mortality, disease, nutrition, maternal health, mental health, and more. No authentication required. Use indicator codes with WHOGHO_get_indicator_data to retrieve actual data values. Examples: 'life expectancy' (WHOSIS_000001), 'malaria' (MALARIA002), 'obesity' (NCD_BMI_30C).

filter.description: OData filter string for indicator names. Examples: "contains(IndicatorName,'malaria')", "contains(IndicatorName,'HIV')", "contains(IndicatorName,'mortality')", "contains(IndicatorName,'obesity')"

top.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default: 10, max: 100

name: WHOGHO_get_indicator_data
description: Get actual health data values for a specific WHO Global Health Observatory indicator by its code. Returns country-level data with values, confidence intervals, year, and sex/age breakdowns. No authentication required. Common indicator codes: WHOSIS_000001 (life expectancy at birth), MALARIA002 (malaria cases), MDG_0000000026 (HIV prevalence), NCD_BMI_30C (obesity prevalence), SDGPM25 (PM2.5 air pollution), WHS4_100 (hospital beds per 10000).

indicator_code.description: WHO GHO indicator code. Examples: 'WHOSIS_000001' (life expectancy), 'MALARIA002' (malaria cases), 'MDG_0000000026' (HIV prevalence), 'NCD_BMI_30C' (obesity), 'SDGPM25' (air pollution PM2.5), 'WHS4_100' (hospital beds)

filter.description: OData filter for data rows. Examples: "SpatialDim eq 'USA'", "TimeDim eq 2022", "Dim1 eq 'SEX_FMLE' and TimeDim ge 2015"

top.description: Maximum number of data rows to return. Default: 20

name: WHOGHO_list_dimension_values
description: Decode WHO GHO dimension codes into human-readable labels and the country->region hierarchy. WHOGHO_get_indicator_data returns cryptic codes (SpatialDim='ABW', Dim1='SEX_FMLE'/'AGEGROUP_AGE0-4', region 'AFR'); this tool resolves every code in a dimension to a Title and gives the country->region rollup via ParentCode (e.g. ABW -> Aruba -> AMR/Americas). Use it to interpret results, build correct $filter clauses for WHOGHO_get_indicator_data, and aggregate countries into WHO regions. Common dimension_code values: 'COUNTRY' (234 ISO-3 country codes + region rollup), 'REGION' (6 WHO regions: AFR/AMR/EMR/EUR/SEAR/WPR), 'SEX' (SEX_BTSX/SEX_MLE/SEX_FMLE), 'AGEGROUP' (e.g. AGEGROUP_AGE0-4), 'GHO' (indicator codes), 'YEAR'. Pass 'Dimension' (capital D, no DimensionValues) to enumerate all 195 dimensions. No authentication required.

dimension_code.description: WHO GHO dimension code whose values to list. Examples: 'COUNTRY' (countries + region parent), 'REGION' (WHO regions), 'SEX', 'AGEGROUP', 'GHO', 'YEAR', 'WORLDBANKINCOMEGROUP'. Special value 'Dimension' (case-sensitive) lists all 195 available dimension codes instead of the values of one dimension.

oneOf.description: OData envelope. The 'value' array holds the dimension values (code -> label, with parent rollup).

Code.description: Dimension value code as returned by WHOGHO_get_indicator_data (e.g. 'ABW', 'SEX_FMLE', 'AGEGROUP_AGE0-4', 'AMR')

Dimension.description: The dimension this value belongs to (e.g. 'COUNTRY')

ParentDimension.description: Parent dimension for hierarchical rollup (e.g. 'REGION' for COUNTRY)

ParentCode.description: Parent code for rollup (e.g. 'AMR' for country 'ABW')
